chapter_title.en: Chapter 11 – The man working in his home (Housework)

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (9/35)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (9/35)
text: قَالَ أَبُو عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) كَانَ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ ( صلى الله عليه وآله ) يَحْلُبُ عَنْزَ أَهْلِهِ .

en.hubeali: Ahmad Bin Abdullah, from Ahmad Bin Abu Abdullah, from Abdal Bn Bin Malik, from Haroun Bin Al Jahm, from Al Kahily, from Muaz Baya’a Al Aksiya who said,
‘Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘Rasool-Allah<sup>saww</sup> used to milk the goats of his<sup>saww</sup> family’.
en.sarwar: 2. Ahmad ibn ‘Abd Allah has narrated from Ahmad ibn abu ‘Abd Allah from ‘Abdul ibn Malik from Harun ibn al-Jahm from al-Kahiliy from Mu‘adh, Bayya‘ al-Akyisah who has said the following: “Abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said, ‘The Messenger of Allah, O Allah, grant compensation to Muhammad and his family worthy of their services to Your cause, would milk his family’s goat.”
